title: Manoj Dhamoo Punjabi’s stake in FILM drops by 4.9%
body: Manoj Dhamoo Punjabi's ownership in PT MD Entertainment Tbk (FILM) decreased by 4.9% following a share sale transaction last week (3/12).

title: INDY branches out to fuel trading
body: PT Indika Energy Tbk (INDY) is further diversifying its business portfolio by entering the fuel trading sector, aiming to support future revenue growth.

title: Domestic investors dominated 92% of transaction value
body: Domestic investors accounted for 92% of the total transaction value on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) on Monday (9/12).

title: Lippo sets up jumbo rights issue for Meikarta following IDR 1.6 trillion loss
body: PT Lippo Cikarang Tbk (LPCK) is undertaking a significant capital increase through a rights issue to continue financing its Meikarta project, following a loss of IDR1.6 trillion.

title: JCI only rose 0.74% earlier this week, Barito Group occupied top laggards
body: The Composite Stock Price Index (IHSG) on Monday (9/12) rose 0.74% or 54.9 points to 7,437.73, supported by the performance of shares from almost all sectors.

title: Manoj Dhamoo Punjabi’s stake in FILM drops by 4.9%
body: Manoj Dhamoo Punjabi's ownership in PT MD Entertainment Tbk (FILM) decreased by 4.9% following a share sale transaction last week (3/12).

title: INDY branches out to fuel trading
body: PT Indika Energy Tbk (INDY) is further diversifying its business portfolio by entering the fuel trading sector, aiming to support future revenue growth.

title: Domestic investors dominated 92% of transaction value
body: Domestic investors accounted for 92% of the total transaction value on the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) on Monday (9/12).

title: Lippo sets up jumbo rights issue for Meikarta following IDR 1.6 trillion loss
body: PT Lippo Cikarang Tbk (LPCK) is undertaking a significant capital increase through a rights issue to continue financing its Meikarta project, following a loss of IDR1.6 trillion.

title: JCI only rose 0.74% earlier this week, Barito Group occupied top laggards
body: The Composite Stock Price Index (IHSG) on Monday (9/12) rose 0.74% or 54.9 points to 7,437.73, supported by the performance of shares from almost all sectors.

title: In pharmaceutical industry, SIDO recorded highest net profit in third quarter 2024
body: PT Industri Jamu dan Farmasi Sido Muncul Tbk (SIDO) recorded the top net profit margin among its 13 competitors during January-September 2024.

title: Eyeing new income source, WOOD to work with CTRA on Sidoarjo landbank
body: PT Integra Indocabinet Tbk (WOOD) partners with PT Ciputra Development Tbk (CTRA) to work on green housing project on its landbank located in Lingkar Timur Wedoro Klurak, Sidoarjo, East Java.

title: PTRO to offer bond and sukuk, proceeds allocation revealed
body: PT Petrosea Tbk (PTRO) will allocate IDR 600 billion of the proceeds of Bond and Sukuk Ijarah offering worth IDR 1.5 trillion for material purchase.

title: Planning a stock split, SAMF saw IDR 20 climb
body: PT Saraswati Anugerah Makmur Tbk (SAMF) is confirming the stock split with 1:2 ratio to take place on February 5, 2025.

title: Allowing more pre-opening stocks, IHSG saw 0.36% increase this morning
body: Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) had modified the regulation regarding stocks tradable during pre-opening and pre-closing periods.

title: Gaining strides since morning, JARR seizes top gainer position
body: The price of PT Jhonlin Agro Raya Tbk (JARR) managed to score 24% increase from the opening bell to the end of morning session today (9/12) at Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX).

title: Down 6.12% in a week, BUMI lowers production target
body: PT Bumi Resources Tbk (BUMI) announced the revised coal production target to 76-78 million ton throughout 2024 from the previous 78-82 million ton.

title: Retiring its supermarket business, HERO is now DFI Retail Nusantara
body: PT Hero Supermarket Tbk (HERO) has officially changed its name to PT DFI Retail Nusantara Tbk following a successful meeting of shareholders last week.

title: Daily transaction frequency rose, IHSG saw 3.77% jump in a week
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (IHSG) posted 3.77% or 268.51-point increase to 7,382.78 last week following growth in daily transaction frequency.

title: BIPI secures place at top of net foreign
body: PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (BIPI) posted net foreign 100.14 million, the highest among other issuers' net foreign at the close of share transactions on Friday (6/12)

title: TMPO reigns Top Gainers by week's closing
body: PT Tempo Inti Media Tbk (TMPO) recorded the highest increase among listed stocks, surging 34.43% by the close of trading on Friday (6/12).

title: Prajogo Pangestu’s Companies Lead IHSG Rally to 7,382.79
body: Stocks owned by Prajogo Pangestu spearheaded the Jakarta Composite Index (IHSG) rise, gaining 0.95% or 69.47 points to reach 7,382.79 during Friday’s (6/12) trading session.

title: Foreign transactions slightly differ, net foreign volume closed at -45.38 million shares
body: On Friday, December 6, foreign buy volume was 2.76 billion shares, while foreign sell volume was 2.81 billion shares. This small discrepancy resulted in net foreign volume closing at -45.38 million shares.

title: Among Five Barito Group Companies, This Stock Shows the Best Performance
body: Stocks owned by Prajogo Pangestu’s Barito Group have demonstrated promising prospects in the capital market. Three out of five of the group's companies have recorded positive stock growth year-to-date (ytd).

title: Struggling with capital deficiency, Anderson Bay takes control of CNKO
body: Anderson Bay Pte Ltd has officially acquired a controlling stake in PT Exploitasi Energi Indonesia Tbk (CNKO), marking a new chapter for the company as it seeks to resolve its capital deficiency issues.

title: IHSG regains strength despite declines in certain sectors
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index or JHSG secures an increase by 0.22% or 16.14 points this morning, arriving at 7,329.46, following 0.18% corrections seen in the market yesterday (5/12).

title: Hong Kong-based UOB Kay Hian purchases 21.75% of Apexindo (APEX) stock
body: Foreign investor UOB Kay Hian (Hong Kong) Ltd acquired 771.35 million shares of PT Apexindo Pratama Duta Tbk (APEX), an issuer that provides onshore and offshore drilling services for the oil and gas sector, on Wednesday, December 4.

title: Mataram Limited to raise portion in SULI
body: Mataram Limited will raise portion in PT SLJ Global Tbk (SULI) via private placement next week (13/12).

title: Peaking at its debut, AADI enters Top Gainers list
body: The price PT Adaro Andalan Indonesia Tbk (AADI) skyrocketed at its first day on Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) last Thursday (5/12), bringing it to the top gainers list.

title: Amid stagnation, BIPI’s shares remain favoured by investors
body: The performance of PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (BIPI) within the first nine months (9M) of 2024 showed a slight decline, but its shares continue to be investors’ favourite.

title: SOEs lagged, IHSG saw decrease to 7,313.31
body: Jakarta Stock Price Composite Index (IHSG) was once again corrected by 0.18% or 13.45 points to 7,313.31 at the closing bell yesterday (5/12) due to massive downturns in state-owned issuers.

title: Foreign buy and sell volume almost equal, net foreign volume closed at 173.32 million shares
body: Foreign investors bought and sold shares in nearly similar amounts on Thursday, December 5, with foreign buy volume at 2.71 billion shares and foreign sell volume at 2.53 billion shares. As a result, net foreign volume finished at around 173.32 million shares. The most shares purchased belonged to the energy resources infrastructure company PT Astrindo Nusantara Infrastruktur Tbk (BIPI), namely 227.64 million shares, with a net volume of 216.30 million shares.

title: DSSA saw 34.41% drop in Q3 profit this year
body: PT Dian Swastatika Sentosa Tbk (DSSA) posted net profit of USD 243.85 million in Q3 2024, down 34.41% year-on-year (yoy) from USD 371.79 million in Q3 2023.

title: Bank Amar launches Embedded Banking in support of micro enterprises
body: Now targeting B2B segment, PT Bank Amar Indonesia Tbk (AMAR) has officially launched its Embedded Banking service today (5/12) to support the scaling of micro, small, and medium enterprises (MSMEs).

title: BMT gains additional 4.79% in FREN for IDR 571.40 billion
body: PT Bali Media Telekomunikasi (BMT) is known to have raised its portion by 4.79% to 41.17% in PT Smartfren Telecom Tbk (FREN).

title: 2025 tobacco excise target lowered, tobacco firms collectively strengthen
body: The Indonesian government has set a tobacco excise target of Rp230.09 trillion for 2025, marking a 6.5% reduction from this year's target.

title: Planning for MESOP, Blibli.com sets price at IDR 430
body: PT Global Digital Niaga Tbk (BELI), the manager of e-commerce blibli.com, will issue 3.18 billion shares in the Management Employee Stock Option Plan (MESOP) program starting next week (15/12).

title: JCI falls into red zone driven by banking shares
body: The Composite Stock Price Index (JCI) in today's first trading session corrected 0.45% to 7,293.96, after strengthening in the last 2 days.

title: SICO eyes 2025 optimistically with 12% revenue growth
body: PT Sigma Energy Compressindo Tbk (SICO) is confident that its revenue may increase by 12% in 2025, compared to realised revenue in 2024.

title: Manoj Dhamoo Punjabi now owns 7.21% of MD Pictures (FILM)
body: Manoj Dhamoo Punjabi purchased around 713.24 million shares of PT MD Pictures Tbk (FILM) through PT Samuel Sekuritas Indonesia on Tuesday, December 3. As of right now, this investor owns 7.21% of the company's shares in the film production company.
